data.title: Italy begins thorough examination of crypto risks following central bank's warning on financial stability.
data.description: Months after receiving a cautionary warning from Italy's central bank about the potential systemic financial risks posed by the mainstream integration of cryptocurrencies, regulators have initiated a probe into the matter. The central bank had highlighted the need for caution due to significant concerns regarding the potential impact on the financial system. The investigation comes amid growing interest and participation in the crypto market, with market capitalization surpassing $2 trillion and various cryptocurrencies gaining popularity among investors. The regulatory scrutiny reflects a broader effort to assess and address the implications of cryptocurrencies on the stability and security of the financial sector.

data.title: Galderma expands Sculptra with MDR certification for body use in EU, adding 4 new areas.
data.description: In Switzerland, Galderma (SIX: GALD), a top player in dermatology, revealed the certification of Sculptra for body applications in the European Union (EU) under the EU Medical Device Regulation (MDR). This approval broadens Sculptra’s existing uses on the face to encompass four additional zones: gluteal area, posterior thighs, décolletage, and upper arms. Sculptra can now be utilized in these regions to target diverse treatment objectives, offering more comprehensive benefits to consumers and further solidifying its position in the market.

data.title: ORIC® Pharmaceuticals shares Enozertinib data at ESMO Asia Congress 2025 for NSCLC patients with HER2 Exon 20 mutations.
data.description: A recent report states that the global pandemic has caused a significant impact on the economy, with a 5.2% contraction in global GDP projected for the current year. This represents the worst economic downturn since the Great Depression of the 1930s. The report also highlights that around 400 million full-time jobs have been lost globally and there has been a $12 trillion loss in global income due to the pandemic. The situation remains dire as countries continue to grapple with the effects of the crisis. Experts emphasize the urgent need for coordinated international efforts to address the economic challenges brought about by the pandemic.

data.title: Netflix in exclusive talks to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery, including HBO Max, in a deal to strengthen the top streaming service. #entertainment #merger
data.description: In a significant deal, Netflix is set to acquire Warner television and film studios along with HBO Max. This acquisition will strengthen the position of Netflix as the largest paid streaming service globally.

data.title: BTC falls to $90K after hitting $93.5K resistance. Strong US job data trumps Fed rate-cut optimism as BTC struggles to hold yearly open.
data.description: Despite optimistic U.S. job data, Bitcoin's price dropped to around $90,000, failing to capitalize on hopes of a Federal Reserve rate cut and unable to reach the yearly opening price for support.

data.title: Ipsen to transfer shares of Beech Tree to Alasol Foundation according to Henri Beaufour's wishes. Regulatory approvals pending.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Ipsen received news that Beech Tree shares will be moved to the Alasol Foundation per the request of late Board Member Mr. Henri Beaufour. Mr. Beaufour, who represented the founding family, passed away on November 28, 2025. The transfer is set to occur in early 2026 post necessary regulatory clearances. Ipsen trades on Euronext under IPN and ADR as IPSEY.

data.title: Dial A Vet & Pawssum team up for Australia's 1st hybrid vet network, offering seamless online-to-in-home care.
data.description: In Brisbane, Australia, Dial A Vet, the nation's fastest-growing veterinary telehealth platform, has partnered with Pawssum Mobile Vets, the largest mobile vet service, to introduce Australia's inaugural fully integrated online-to-in-home veterinary care pathway. This initiative aims to connect digital guidance with in-person treatment, providing Australian pet owners with a smooth veterinary journey. This collaboration ensures immediate access to veterinary advice and services to address pet health concerns effectively.
